title: centaurea leonidia
intro: Centaurea leonidia, also known as Knapweed, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. It is native to the Mediterranean region and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant's roots and leaves are rich in sesquiterpene lactones, which are responsible for its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Centaurea leonidia can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, from skin conditions to gastrointestinal problems.
